name: wellness-dashboard
_note: mental-health.wellness-dashboard is a read-only LENS_ACTIONS aggregator over the per-user in-memory substrate (sessions/moods/sleep/courses/gratitude). It is degrade-graceful by construction: an empty user returns ok:true with all-zero / null stats (never no_db / never throw — it is wrapped in try/catch and returns {ok:false,error} only when STATE itself is unavailable). Pinned by server/tests/mental-health-lens-macros.test.js. Lens-action domain — not assassin-enumerable via runMacro.
